full_text:
Gu Lang (Yixian) 谷朗 (義先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gu Lang (谷朗), styledYixian (義先). Governed Jiuzhen for Wu. Gu Lang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
